    uid=1_606 heading "Reducing Boilerplate Code" level="2"
    uid=1_607 StaticText "With nesting, you can "
    uid=1_608 StaticText "avoid repeating "
    uid=1_25 StaticText "common styles common styles common styles common styles"
    uid=1_609 StaticText "common styles"
    uid=1_610 StaticText " in multiple "
    uid=1_25 StaticText "selectors selectors selectors selectors"
    uid=1_611 StaticText "selectors"
    uid=1_612 StaticText ". This helps reduce the size of your code and makes "

    uid=1_25 StaticText "easier easier easier easier"

    uid=1_641 heading "Mechanics of Nesting" level="2"
    uid=1_25 StaticText "CSS Nesting allows you to style elements within the context of an ancestor's rule. If you want your CSS code to be easier to read, this will create a hierarchy that reflects your HTML structure document that also makes your code easier to manage."
